ridge$lambda.min

G <- crossprod(x_train) / nrow(x_train)

eig <- eigen(G)$values

lambda <- ridge$lambda.min

kappa_before <- max(eig) / min(eig)

kappa_after <- (max(eig) + lambda) /
               (min(eig) + lambda)

data.frame(
  Matrix = c("Gram matrix (G)", "Ridge matrix (G + λI)"),
  Condition_Number = c(kappa_before, kappa_after)
)
